title: Snr. Project Coordinator
description:
Job Description:

•Plan daily work schedule with resources requisition and overall project supervision and preparation of RA, SWP before start of work

•Oversee all the projects to ensure work is carried out according to timeframe and specification

•Supervise and coordinate all construction work on site

•Solve operational site issue and coordinate closely internal and external team to meet the project deadline

•Ensure cost control and project completion within budget, utilization of resources and schedule

•Attend site inspection or meetings with consultant or client

•Attend weekly meetings on work progress and projection

•Arrange, Manage and control site workers to ensure work complied with quality and safety requirement

•To handle and ensure the processing of all arrangements with accuracy and timeliness.

•Ensure compliance with safety regulations and latest WSH Act provisions at all times

•Other ad hoc duties that are assigned.


Requirement

•At least 1-3 years of relevant experience in Construction Industry

•Experience in Waterproofing or Concrete Repair works preferred

•Proficient in site coordination

•Good communication and organizational skills

•Able to work independently with minimum supervision as well as in a team environment

•Able to work under pressure with high initiative and meeting timelines

•Able Understand & doing AutoCAD Drawing

•Possess Class 2B and Class 3 driving license

•BCSS cert preferred


Benefits

•Company Vehicle Provided

•Incentives

postedCompany.description:
LEFONG BUILDING SERVICES PTE LTD is a registered Singapore Waterproofing Contractor with Building and Construction Authority (BCA). We aim to be the most reputable and effective company in the waterproofing industries.

Our foremost objective is to provide our customers with good quality materials at a reasonable rate. Always trying our best to meet the expectation of our customers, we delivered our work in a timely manner. We ensure all our objective are met, to uphold the name Waterproofing Specialist.

Why choose us

It is essential that you choose the right waterproofing contractors. The professional team at Le Fong is committed to providing excellence in customer service and skilled workmanship. We will provide you with long lasting, effective and economical waterproofing solutions to suit your needs. We believe that our prompt and reliable waterproofing services as well as our standard of workmanship are what set us apart from other waterproofing specialists and contractors – our competitors. In addition to this we offer:

  • Attention to Detail
  • Skilled & Reliable Waterproofing Contractors
  • Quality workmanship on all waterproofing jobs large or small
  • 10+ years of experience in the waterproofing industry
  • Free Waterproofing Inspections and Troubleshooting
  • Price Match Promise

We understand that the most important part of the waterproofing process is to diagnose a problem in order to devise the most effective solution. We only use the best quality products. Our vast knowledge and experience helps us choose the most appropriate products and solutions for your requirements.
postedCompany.name: LE FONG BUILDING SERVICES PTE. LTD.
